description:
Professional, real-time animation software.

Cavalry is a powerful 2D Animation software for macOS and Windows making waves in the worlds of animation, motion design, creative coding, film, generative art, data visualisation, experiential and advertising.
Enhancements
- Deleting Layers in the Scene Tree is now ~10x faster.
Notable Bug Fixes
- When deleting keyframes from animation curves in the Graph Editor, the animation curve is no longer deselected.
- When moving the Centre of a Spherise Filter, the resulting lighting is no longer inverted.
- The 'Frame tools' have been restored to the Cel Animation Shape's UI.
- An over-optimisation meaning updates to a Shape with a connected Resample Path were not instant has been resolved.
- An issue meaning a Shape with a Mirror Filter could become clipped when zooming the Viewport has been resolved.
Notes
- The CLI is not available in Cavalry 2.7.2 so if you are using this feature, please remain on your current version. We are working towards reinstating this for future versions.
